positive: A whimsical, retro-futuristic portrait of a sloth wearing oversized aviator goggles and a tweed vest, set against a pastel gradient background. Mid-century modern illustration style, detailed line work, vibrant colors, highly stylized, suitable for screen printing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealistic, grayscale, messy lines
